LSE-HS11-L4-13001400-HSELA1112-PPX-MNA-02 • HS English/ELA Grades 11–12 • Author's Structural Choices

The Letter from Beirut

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Build a full justification: make a claim about what the teacher’s lesson is really about, explain the reasoning he gives, and state the conclusion about what the placement of the news does to the writing.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RL.11-12.5  |  HS English/ELA Grades 11–12: Author's Structural Choices
